name: User Login Flow - Standard Credentials
description: Validates that a user can log in with correct email and password.

name: User Login Flow - Invalid Password
description: Ensures the system rejects incorrect passwords with a 401.

name: Login Redundancy Check
description: A duplicate of auth-001 used to test the optimizer's detection logic.

name: Add Item to Cart
description: Verifies that clicking 'Add to Cart' updates the cart count.

name: Remove Item from Cart
description: Ensures items can be removed and the total price updates correctly.

name: Guest Checkout Process
description: Validates the full checkout flow for unauthenticated users.

name: Registered User Checkout
description: Validates checkout flow using saved address and payment info.

name: Global API Health Check
description: Pings all major service endpoints to ensure 200 OK status.

name: Update Avatar Image
description: Tests the upload and processing of user profile pictures.

name: Change Display Name
description: Ensures name changes persist across the application.
